label: Incident
content: An unplanned disruptive event that affects another entity. The Meridian Grace's fuel-pump failure off Point Roberts is an instance. Note that this is an entity prototype, not a component — the disruption *is* a thing in the world, with its own time and participants.

_provenance.rationale: Demonstrates how the dropped `incident` component is replaced: an incident becomes an entity composed from event + location + relations.
